name: RecurringBillingEngine

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: StatusCheck=1, LockAcquire=2, InvoiceGen=3, Charge=4, AuditWrite=5, ResultEmit=6
SCHEDULED archetype — triggered by BillingCycleDue delayed queue job, not @EventPattern
CANCELLED/PAUSED → InvoiceVoided immediately at ORDER 1 — no lock acquired. CF-12-1.
Lock=false (concurrent run) → skip entire cycle at ORDER 2 — prevents double-billing
invoiceId = hash(tenantId+subscriptionId+periodKey) — idempotency key for charge
dunningSchedule from FREEDOM config key 'subscription_billing_dunning_schedule' — NEVER hardcoded. CF-12-3.
storeDocument(billingAudit) at ORDER 5 BEFORE any enqueue — DNA-8

ironRules.rule: getStatus() at ORDER 1 — CANCELLED/PAUSED → emit InvoiceVoided, return immediately. No lock acquired. CF-12-1.
Lock acquisition at ORDER 2 — lock=false (concurrent run) → return without charge. CF-12-1.
Invoice generation at ORDER 3 — only after status=ACTIVE and lock=true.
Charge at ORDER 4 — after invoiceId established as idempotency key.
storeDocument(billingAudit) at ORDER 5 BEFORE any enqueue. DNA-8.
dunningSchedule from FREEDOM config 'subscription_billing_dunning_schedule' — NEVER hardcoded constant. CF-12-3.
maxAttempts = dunningSchedule.length — never a separate hardcoded constant. CF-12-3.

keywords: recurring billing engine status check lock acquire invoice charge audit dunning schedule FREEDOM config CANCELLED PAUSED DPO conflict FLOW-09 inversion
